71: A delivery of supplies that our people use to cleanse their homes in the midst of bustling cities. Sprigs of saca sage and purifying water from the Niikwerepi.
A delivery of supplies that our people use to cleanse their homes in the midst of bustling cities. Sprigs of saca sage and purifying water from Niikwerepi.

91: The Niikwerepi feeds into several bodies of water, Lake Toari among them. Such water passes through countless valleys and under vast reaches of sky, and connects us to that unfathomable journey.
